description: Android/KMM MCP server: logcat, ADB device control, Compose previews, network, Maestro flows.
name: io.github.Yercko/devilge

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Android/KMM project root that devilge inspects (Gradle modules, source files, build outputs).
environmentVariables.name: DEVILGE_ANDROID_PROJECT_ROOT

environmentVariables.description: Directory where devilge writes screenshots and UI dumps. Defaults to <projectRoot>/.devilge-outputs/.
environmentVariables.name: DEVILGE_OUTPUTS_ROOT

environmentVariables.description: Default ADB serial used when a tool does not specify one. Useful when several devices/emulators are attached.
environmentVariables.name: DEVILGE_DEFAULT_DEVICE_SERIAL

environmentVariables.description: Directory containing Maestro YAML flows. Defaults to <projectRoot>/devilge-flows/.
environmentVariables.name: DEVILGE_FLOWS_ROOT

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Maestro binary. If unset, devilge resolves it from PATH; if absent, Maestro tools degrade gracefully.
environmentVariables.name: DEVILGE_MAESTRO_BIN_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to allow Maestro flows containing 'runScript:' blocks. Default is false; flows with scripts are rejected.
environmentVariables.name: DEVILGE_ALLOW_FLOW_SCRIPTS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated logcat tags scanned for HTTP traffic. Defaults to 'HttpClient,OkHttp' (covers Ktor + OkHttp/Retrofit).
environmentVariables.name: DEVILGE_HTTP_LOG_TAGS

environmentVariables.description: HTTP log parser to use: 'auto' (default), 'ktor', or 'okhttp'.
environmentVariables.name: DEVILGE_HTTP_LOG_FORMAT
